name: Robotics team
brief: A credible, energetic robotics team site with build evidence and a join path.
title: Build the machine. Prove the move.
body: A student robotics team documenting mechanisms, match strategy, and the people who make both work.

name: Developer tool
brief: A precise API inspection tool page grounded in real workflow language.
title: Every request, opened up.
body: Capture headers, timings, payloads, and retries in one local inspection stream—without turning the page into a fake terminal.

name: Enterprise dashboard
brief: A dense operational dashboard with calm hierarchy and visible states.
title: Exceptions first. Throughput second.
body: Review blocked orders, assign owners, and resolve inventory risk before the next dispatch window.

name: Public service
brief: A plainspoken benefits eligibility page with high-trust information.
title: Check which heating support you can apply for.
body: Answer five questions. You will see likely programs, documents to gather, and how to apply. This check does not submit an application.

name: Creative portfolio
brief: An authored editorial portfolio with selective project proof.
title: I make interfaces you can feel before you touch.
body: Three collaborations across climate hardware, public archives, and performance tools—shown through decisions, not a wall of thumbnails.

name: Ecommerce product
brief: A product page with concrete material and purchase information.
title: A weather shell built to be repaired.
body: Three-layer recycled nylon, replaceable cuff hardware, and a cut designed for movement over winter layers.

name: Incident status
brief: An honest incident page with current state, impact, and recovery timeline.
title: Delayed webhook delivery in us-east.
body: New events are processing normally. We are draining the delayed queue and monitoring delivery time before resolving the incident.

name: Community event
brief: A welcoming community workshop page with a concrete invitation.
title: Bring one broken thing. Leave knowing how it works.
body: Neighbors and volunteer fixers share tools, repair small appliances, and document what they learn for the next table.

name: Product documentation
brief: A documentation home with strong terminology and task-oriented entry points.
title: Ship a signed event in ten minutes.
body: Create a source, verify the signature locally, inspect the delivery attempt, and add retries only where your system needs them.

name: Product launch
brief: A launch page where the product demonstration is the focal plane.
title: Cut the dead time between idea and first frame.
body: Sketch a shot, generate a low-cost draft, and move the chosen take into a real timeline with provenance attached.
